info.name: Wan2GP REST API
info.description: Wan2GP REST API plugin for image and video generation. Submit jobs, track progress, and retrieve results.

body.raw:
{
  "task": {
    "image_mode": 1,
    "prompt": "A glass greenhouse filled with lush tropical plants, misty air, and dappled light",
    "resolution": "1024x1024",
    "num_inference_steps": 4,
    "seed": -1,
    "batch_size": 1,
    "model_type": "flux2_klein_9b",
    "model_filename": "https://huggingface.co/DeepBeepMeep/Flux2/resolve/main/flux-2-klein-9b_quanto_bf16_int8.safetensors",
    "NAG_scale": 1,
    "NAG_tau": 3.5,
    "NAG_alpha": 0.5
  }
}

description.content: Submit an image generation job using Flux 2 Klein model at 1024x1024 resolution.

body.raw:
{
  "task": {
    "image_mode": 0,
    "prompt": "A warm sunny backyard, cinematic camera movement with natural lighting",
    "resolution": "1280x720",
    "video_length": 241,
    "num_inference_steps": 8,
    "seed": -1,
    "batch_size": 1,
    "model_type": "ltx2_22B_distilled_gguf_q4_k_m",
    "model_filename": "https://huggingface.co/DeepBeepMeep/LTX-2/resolve/main/ltx-2.3-22b-distilled-Q4_K_M_light.gguf",
    "base_model_type": "ltx2_22B",
    "audio_scale": 1,
    "sliding_window_size": 481,
    "sliding_window_overlap": 17
  }
}

description.content: Submit a video generation job using LTX-2 model at 1280x720 resolution, 241 frames.
Submit new generation jobs for image or video creation.
List all jobs, ordered from newest to oldest.

variable.description: Replace with the actual job ID returned from a submit request.

description.content: Poll a job's status and progress percentage. Set the job_id variable or replace {{job_id}} in the URL.

variable.description: Replace with the actual job ID to cancel.

description.content: Cancel a running job. Returns 409 if the job is already in a terminal state.
Submit multiple generation tasks in a single request. Each task is processed independently.

formdata.description: Upload one or more media files. The response returns server-side paths for use in job submissions.

description.content: Upload media files via multipart/form-data. Use the returned paths in image_start, video_source, etc. fields when submitting jobs.

variable.description: Base URL of the Wan2GP REST API server.
Job ID returned from a submit request. Replace this value or use it dynamically in request URLs.
